title: Postgres Backend Migration & Profile Parity (Revised v3)
author: orchestrator
summary: Postgres is the authoritative write path. PGlite for local/desktop, pg for CI. Existing SQLite user data migrated. DuckDB deferred. Profile parity proceeds in parallel.

current_state.runtime_backend: SQLite via bun:sqlite or node:sqlite (db.bun.ts / db.node.ts)
current_state.adapter_seam: DatabaseAdapter.Service exists with Interface (query/transaction/afterCommit), SQLiteAdapter impl, PostgresTransactionOptions typed but unused.
current_state.schemas: 8 files from drizzle-orm/sqlite-core (7 .sql.ts with sqliteTable + schema.sql.ts helper)
current_state.live_call_sites_in_src: 11 Database.use/transaction across 6 files; 2 Database.Client(); 4 Database.getPath (all in cli/cmd/db.ts)
current_state.adapter_consumers: 15 source files use DatabaseAdapter.Service via yield*
current_state.test_call_sites: 52 Database.use in 13 test files; 35 import resetDatabase()
current_state.effect_drizzle_bridge: exists at packages/effect-drizzle-sqlite but production code does not use it. DrizzleLikeClient wrapper is intentional boundary.

dirty_file_audit.audit_command: git status --porcelain (run at plan creation time)
dirty_file_audit.total_untracked: 40+ files untracked (mostly new tool files in src/tool/ and test/ directories)

files_in_scope.strategy: read existing content, apply additive edits only for PgAdapter class, use expected_before_sha256 on search_replace
read existing modified regions first, apply additive edit for synced() function conversion
additive edit on convertEvent callback to accept DatabaseAdapter.Service via Effect context
additive edit on load() function to accept DatabaseAdapter.Service
read first, apply additive edit for Database.Client() call migration
additive edit for PRAGMA gating behind backend detection
read first, additive edit for adapter layer provisioning
read first, additive edit for adapter layer provisioning

dirty_file_audit.conflict_policy: If any edit would remove or conflict with existing modifications, stop and report the conflict. Preserve all pre-existing modifications exactly. Use expected_before_sha256 on all search_replace operations on dirty files.

tracks.name: Database Migration
tracks.exit_condition: Postgres is the authoritative write path. PGlite handles local/desktop. Existing SQLite user data has a documented migration path. SQLite is no longer the default backend (deferred seams resolved or carved out).

phases.name: Database Security Foundation
phases.description: Establish credential management via Effect Redacted-backed Config layer at src/effect/ (not src/config/). Use $OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL convention exclusively (not $DATABASE_URL). Document pg_hba.conf requirements (hostssl, scram-sha-256). PGlite binds to localhost only. Define role separation (opencode_app CRUD, opencode_migration DDL). Add SSL requirement for pg driver.
files_changed: packages/opencode/src/effect/ (new DatabaseConfig Effect module using Effect Redacted for secrets)
phases.acceptance: Database credentials are never exposed in process.env to subprocesses. TLS required for CI pg connections. PGlite localhost-only. Config validates required connection params. $OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL convention established.
blocking_defects: dirty_file_audit: adapter.ts is untracked, must be preserved

phases.name: Rename SQLite Schema Files
phases.description: Rename all 8 .sql.ts schema files to .sqlite.sql.ts. Update ~35-45 import sites across src/ and test/. Include json-migration.ts import paths explicitly. This is a mechanical rename requiring no logic changes.
files_changed: ~35-45 import sites in src/ and test/ (incl json-migration.ts, storage/schema.ts, all cross-schema references)
phases.acceptance: All imports updated. typecheck passes. Zero runtime behavior change. grep for 'from .*.sql"' returns only .sqlite.sql.ts and .pg.sql.ts paths.

phases.name: Guard SQLite PRAGMAs
phases.description: Replace 10 unconditional SQLite PRAGMAs: db.ts has 6 (journal_mode=WAL, synchronous=NORMAL, busy_timeout=5000, cache_size=-64000, foreign_keys=ON, wal_checkpoint), json-migration.ts has 4 (journal_mode=WAL, synchronous=OFF, cache_size=10000, temp_store=MEMORY). Guard by backend detection or replace with Postgres-compatible SET statements.
phases.acceptance: No SQLite PRAGMAs execute unconditionally. Postgres SET equivalents provided where possible.

phases.name: Postgres Drivers & Dependencies
phases.description: Install @electric-sql/pglite (local desktop) and pg + @types/pg (CI). Create db.pg.ts init function. Add #db-pg import alias to package.json. Add GitHub Actions Postgres service container for CI tests.
files_changed: packages/opencode/src/storage/db.pg.ts (new - PGlite and pg init function with SSL/config)
phases.acceptance: bun add completes. typecheck passes. drizzle-orm/pglite driver resolves (verify: ls node_modules/@electric-sql/pglite/ and ls node_modules/drizzle-orm/pglite/ exist). db.pg.ts creates both PGlite and pg connections.
blocking_defects: Phase 1.0 (rename) must be complete for schema correctness

phases.name: Postgres Schema Files + Drizzle Config
phases.description: Create 8 parallel .pg.sql.ts files. Map: sqliteTable→pgTable, text({mode:'json'})→jsonb(), integer({mode:'boolean'})→boolean(). Create drizzle.config.pg.ts alongside first .pg.sql.ts with dialect='postgresql' and glob restricted to .pg.sql.ts files. Verify integer().$onUpdate() works with pg-core by typechecking a reference file. PGlite verification step: confirm node_modules/@electric-sql/pglite/ and node_modules/drizzle-orm/pglite/ exist before creating .pg.sql.ts files.
phases.acceptance: Each file compiles with pg-core imports. drizzle-kit generate runs against .pg.sql.ts. Column mapping verified 1:1 with .sqlite.sql.ts variants. typecheck passes. PGlite and drizzle-orm/pglite node_modules confirmed present.
blocking_defects: Verify integer().$onUpdate() with pg-core before proceeding

phases.name: PostgresAdapter Implementation
phases.description: Add PgAdapter implementing same Interface as SQLiteAdapter. Uses PGlite/pg via #db-pg init. Wire defaultLayer for config/env-based selection. Default to SQLite during transition, switchable via $OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL. Ensure app-runtime.ts and bootstrap-runtime.ts provide the adapter layer. Uses DrizzleLikeClient wrapper pattern (not effect-drizzle bridge) as the intentional boundary.
files_changed: packages/opencode/src/storage/adapter.ts (add PgAdapter, wire defaultLayer selection based on $OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL presence)
phases.acceptance: PgAdapter compiles. defaultLayer selects based on $OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL presence. adapter unit tests pass with both adapters. app-runtime.ts provides adapter. dirty file audit: adapter.ts is untracked - preserve existing content.

phases.name: Generate Initial Postgres DDL
phases.description: Run drizzle-kit generate against drizzle.config.pg.ts to produce initial Postgres migration in migration-pg/. Apply on startup when Postgres backend is active.
files_changed: packages/opencode/src/storage/db.ts (add Postgres migration loading path alongside SQLite path)
phases.acceptance: drizzle-kit generates valid Postgres DDL. Migration applies on startup when Postgres backend is active. typecheck passes.

phases.name: Migrate Production Database Call Sites
phases.description: Convert 8 of 11 direct Database.use/transaction sites to DatabaseAdapter.Service. 3 deferred. Handle 7 json_extract sql tagged templates in data-migration.ts → Postgres jsonb operators (->> for text, ::numeric cast). Priority: data-migration.ts(4), project/project.ts(3 standalone), control-plane/workspace.ts(synced), sync/index.ts(process). Update: v2/session.ts, index.ts drizzle import gating, session/projectors-next.ts TxOrDb, storage/json-migration.ts type signature, node.ts public API.
files_changed: packages/opencode/src/node.ts (public Database export deprecation or guard)
phases.acceptance: 8 of 11 sites use adapter. 3 deferred (projectors.ts, fence.ts, cli/cmd/db.ts). json_extract grep returns 0 in converted files. typecheck passes. All SQLiteAdapter-dependent code still passes tests.
blocking_defects: Dirty file audit: adapter.ts, workspace.ts, v2/session.ts, app-runtime.ts, bootstrap-runtime.ts are dirty - preserve existing content

phases.name: Migrate Test Database Call Sites
phases.description: Convert 52 Database.use calls in 13 test files. Update 35 resetDatabase importers. Add schema-per-test isolation model (see design note below). Provide adapter layer selection in testEffect. Audit httpapi-exercise indirection.
files_changed: 35 test files importing resetDatabase (transitive fix through fixture)
phases.acceptance: All tests use DatabaseAdapter.Service or testEffect with configurable backend. Tests pass under SQLite. Schema-per-test isolation documented for Postgres parallel execution.

design_notes.schema_per_test: Tests use CREATE SCHEMA test_${workerId} with DROP SCHEMA ... CASCADE cleanup. For PGlite: file-per-test provides natural isolation. For pg service: connection pooling with schema-per-worker (DEFAULT_SCHEMA set per session). Each worker gets unique schema. resetDatabase() drops and recreates tables within the worker's schema.

phases.name: SQLite-to-Postgres Data Migration
phases.description: Write migrate-to-pg.ts CLI command. Reads SQLite directly via Database import from ./storage/db (bypasses adapter layer). Writes to Postgres directly via PGlite/pg client (bypasses adapter layer). Pre-migration FK audit on existing SQLite data. Post-migration row-count + SHA256 checksum verification. Rollback: renames opencode.db to opencode.db.pre-pg-migration. Phase 1.8 checks migration-flag file.
files_changed: packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/migrate-to-pg.ts (new - imports Database directly from ./storage/db for SQLite reads, uses pg/PGlite client directly for Postgres writes)
phases.acceptance: All data from SQLite present in Postgres. Row counts and SHA256 checksums match. Rollback available via .db.pre-pg-migration rename. CLI command documented.
blocking_defects: FK audit: violations must be repaired before migration

phases.name: Resolve Deferred Database Seams
phases.description: Rewrite projectors.ts and fence.ts to use DatabaseAdapter.Service directly (requires SyncEvent.init() signature change to support Effect context). cli/cmd/db.ts: explicitly carve out as SQLite-only debugging tool that retains a stripped db.bun.ts import for interactive inspection.
files_changed: packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/db.ts (document as SQLite-only carveout, retain stripped db.bun.ts import)
phases.acceptance: projectors.ts and fence.ts use DatabaseAdapter.Service. cli/cmd/db.ts documented as SQLite-only debugging tool. Phase 1.8 blocking_defects reference this phase.

phases.name: SQLite Deprecation & Cleanup
phases.description: #db import alias routes to db.pg.ts (PGlite init) instead of db.bun.ts. Remove db.bun.ts, db.node.ts. Remove all .sqlite.sql.ts files (.pg.sql.ts become canonical). Remove drizzle.config.ts (drizzle.config.pg.ts becomes primary, renamed). Update package.json #db alias, remove #db-pg. Update node.ts public API. Clean up test/fixture/db.ts for Postgres-native cleanup.

files_changed.action: update: #db points to db.pg.ts; remove #db-pg (now redundant)

files_changed: packages/opencode/drizzle.config.ts (change to postgresql dialect, remove SQLite-only glob)
packages/opencode/src/node.ts (update public API to reflect Postgres default)
packages/opencode/test/fixture/db.ts (Postgres-native cleanup, remove SQLite file deletion)
phases.acceptance: SQLite is no longer the default backend. No SQLite-specific files remain in src/storage/. All tests pass with Postgres. Deferred seams (projectors.ts, fence.ts) use DatabaseAdapter.Service per Phase 1.7b. cli/cmd/db.ts has explicit SQLite-only carveout. Existing users with .db.pre-pg-migration have documented restore path.

tracks.name: Profile Parity
tracks.exit_condition: Repo-side prompts/config/docs match installed OpenCode behavior.
tracks.note_on_paths: config/agent_config/ does NOT exist in this codebase. Track 2 phases target src/agent/ (which exists with agent profile source files: agent.ts, subagent-permissions.ts, prompt/*.txt) or create new prompt/config files where needed. Executor must verify exact target path before editing.

phases.name: Orchestrator Wave Model in Source
phases.description: Encode learning-first, delegate-first flow, no-self-inspection rule, approval-artifact gates (plan_approval.v1.json, red_team_approval.v1.json, repair_plan_approval.v1.json) as first-class behavior in prompt/config source files.
files_changed: packages/opencode/src/agent/ (prompt and agent profile files - not config/agent_config/ which does not exist)
phases.acceptance: Source-backed orchestrator prompts match installed behavior. Approval artifacts enforced as gates.
blocking_defects: Executor must identify correct target file path (config/agent_config/ does not exist; use src/agent/)

phases.name: Reviewer Set Cleanup & Posture
phases.description: Clean up legacy reviewer profiles. Add long-horizon senior-engineer behavior default. Enforce three-long-run-proposals requirement on blocking reviews.
phases.acceptance: Source prompt files contain same reviewer posture as installed config.

phases.name: Documentation Update
phases.description: Update docs to reflect Postgres/DuckDB backend truth. Remove SQLite assumptions.

rollback_strategy.method: Pinned SQLite version checkpoint + pre-migration data backup
rollback_strategy.pre_1.7_code_rollback: git revert the most recent checkpoint commit. Pre-1.7 work is purely additive (parallel files) and does not remove SQLite.
rollback_strategy.post_1.7_data_rollback: Unset $OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL, rename opencode.db.pre-pg-migration back to opencode.db. Postgres drops are reversible via the initial migration-pg/ DDL reapply.
rollback_strategy.post_1.8_rollback: git revert the Phase 1.8 checkpoint commit + restore .db.pre-pg-migration. Phase 1.8 is the only destructive removal phase.
rollback_strategy.pre_1.8_stoppage: Phase 1.7b (deferred seams) and Phase 1.8 are gated by explicit approval. Do not proceed until deferred seams demonstrate working DatabaseAdapter.Service usage.

data_integrity_checks: Pre-migration (Phase 1.7): FK constraint audit on existing SQLite data. Repair violations before migration.
Post-migration: row count per table + SHA256 checksum match between SQLite source and Postgres destination.
Rollback: verify no data loss after rollback by comparing pre-copy checksums.
Phase 1.7b: verify projectors.ts and fence.ts produce same results with DatabaseAdapter.Service as with raw Database.use.
out_of_scope: effect-drizzle-pg bridge package (DrizzleLikeClient wrapper is intentional boundary)
PGlite full feature verification (deferred to proof-of-use)
